articles.title: Coinbase Wallet Drops Support for XRP, Stellar (XLM), Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Ethereum Classic (ETC)
articles.description: Top US crypto exchange Coinbase says it will end support for crypto assets with low usage on its self-custody digital wallet. According to Coinbase Wallet, it will pull out the plug for XRP, Stellar (XLM), Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Ethereum Classic (ETC) by next year. “After careful evaluation, we will be removing support for several networks […]

articles.title: CFTC Chair Changes His Mind About Ethereum Being a Commodity
articles.description: After years of arguing the contrary, Rostin Benham’s position on crypto commodities now resembles that of Gary Gensler.

articles.title: Solana-based market maker integrates Stripe for fiat-crypto transactions
articles.description: The Solana-based automated market maker Orca opened up fiat purchases and fiat-to-crypto transactions through a new integration with Stripe’s onramp.

articles.title: Chainlink (LINK) Is About To Launch Staking – These Are The Next Target Zones
articles.description: While Chainlink staking v0.1 will go live on the mainnet on December 6, the LINK price has shown a strong performance over the past week. At press time, LINK was trading at $7.58, and thus up 13.5% over the last week. Still, Chainlink has been going sideways for seven months. articles.title: Ethereum’s Ropsten testnet to fully shut down this month
articles.description: The Ropsten network, a clone of the main Ethereum network that's used for testing purposes, will shut down by the end of this month.

articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Price Could Still Drop 60% Before Bottoming out, Analyst Says
articles.description: Popular cryptocurrency analyst and influencer Benjamin Cowen has said that there is a “real risk” that the price of smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) could still drop over 60% during the bear market before bottoming out. In a video Cowen shared with his over 770,000 subscribers on the Google-owned video-sharing platform YouTube, the analyst said […]
